subtasks.title: Fix paisa-precision in money conversion
subtasks.acceptance: to_paise is exact for int/float/str amounts; sub-paisa precision raises ValueError; no float arithmetic on currency; regression tests for 19.99 and string inputs.

subtasks.title: Add INR formatting and UPI settlement summary
subtasks.acceptance: format_inr renders Indian digit grouping (₹12,34,567.89) incl. negatives; settlement_summary(transfers) renders 'debtor → creditor: ₹x (UPI)' lines and handles the empty case; tests added.
